events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: residential job, conductor selection & sizing, crew proposes shortcut, submittal omits product listing page and project note that would decide whether shortcut allowed. Reference NEC 310, Table 310.16. Need decide practical compliant course. Since missing info to determine if shortcut allowed, decision likely needs_more_info. But if shortcut non-compliant until proven, maybe fail? Let's parse.

Task: "The crew proposes a shortcut for Conductor selection & sizing, but the submittal omits the product listing page and project note that would decide whether the shortcut is allowed here." We are to evaluate field condition and return decision. Since in-progress, component conditions none flagged. The shortcut may or may not be allowed depending on product listing and project note. Without that, cannot pass. It is not necessarily dangerous/non-compliant yet, but cannot approve. Decision options pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since dangerous or non-compliant -> fail. Is it non-compliant? The shortcut is proposed; not installed? Work in-progress. Missing documentation means cannot verify compliance. The appropriate decision is needs_more_info. Risk maybe medium because conductor undersizing could cause overheating/fire. Work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 30. value? Not asked numeric reading; maybe 0. sound_source etc default. order empty. workable empty. findings: submittal incomplete; proposed shortcut lacks product listing and project note to verify allowance under NEC 310/Table 310.16. actions: request product listing page and project note; size conductors per NEC 310.16 and manufacturer instructions; do not install until approved. rationale: conductor sizing must be based on ampacity, temperature rating, termination ratings, and any listed assembly conditions; shortcut cannot be accepted without documentation. references: NEC 310, Table 310.16, 110.3(B) maybe manufacturer instructions. Need include references as code anchors. confidence high? 0.9. event_time 0, rate 0.

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

  ],
